tripOverview.intro: London combines historic charm with modern romance, perfect for couples seeking intimate moments and cultural adventures. From cozy pubs to world-class museums, this vibrant city offers endless opportunities for memorable experiences.
tripOverview.vibe: A whirlwind romantic adventure through London's most iconic neighborhoods, markets, and cultural treasures.

destinationOverview.bestTime: April to June offers mild weather and blooming flowers, perfect for walking and outdoor dining.

attractions.name: Tower Bridge
attractions.desc: Iconic Victorian bridge with glass walkways and stunning Thames views.

attractions.name: British Museum
attractions.desc: World-renowned museum housing ancient artifacts and cultural treasures.

attractions.name: Covent Garden
attractions.desc: Historic market area with street performers, shops, and restaurants.

attractions.name: Hyde Park
attractions.desc: Royal park perfect for romantic strolls and outdoor relaxation.

attractions.name: Camden Market
attractions.desc: Alternative market featuring unique crafts, vintage items, and diverse food.

destinationOverview.transportation: London's extensive Underground system connects all major attractions efficiently, with Oyster cards offering convenient payment. Black cabs are iconic but pricier, while Uber operates throughout the city. Walking between nearby attractions is often faster than transport during peak hours.
destinationOverview.tip: Download Citymapper for real-time transport updates and always stand right on escalators - Londoners take this seriously!
destinationOverview.safety: London is very safe for LGBTQ+ travelers, with Soho being the main gay district and most areas welcoming to all.
destinationOverview.airaloText: Stay connected with an eSIM for instant internet access, perfect for navigation and sharing your London moments.

days.intro: Start your London adventure with iconic landmarks and romantic river views.

morning.name: Tower of London
morning.desc: Explore the historic fortress and see the Crown Jewels together.

morning.name: Tower Bridge
morning.desc: Walk across the famous bridge and enjoy Thames views.

afternoon.name: Thames River Cruise
afternoon.desc: Romantic boat ride with commentary and city views.

afternoon.name: Covent Garden
afternoon.desc: Browse shops and watch street performers in historic market.

evening.name: Dinner at Dishoom
evening.desc: Romantic Indian cuisine in beautiful art deco setting.

evening.name: West End Show
evening.desc: Catch a romantic musical in London's theater district.

days.tip: Book West End shows in advance for better seats and prices - many theaters offer day-of-show lottery tickets too.

days.intro: Discover Borough Market's incredible flavors and explore world-class cultural attractions.

morning.name: Borough Market
morning.desc: Browse London's oldest food market with incredible vegetarian options.

morning.name: Southwark Cathedral
morning.desc: Historic cathedral near the market with beautiful architecture.

afternoon.name: Tate Modern
afternoon.desc: World-renowned contemporary art in former power station.

afternoon.name: Millennium Bridge
afternoon.desc: Romantic walk across the Thames to St. Paul's Cathedral.

evening.name: Soho Exploration
evening.desc: Explore London's vibrant LGBTQ+ district with charming streets.

evening.name: Mildreds Soho
evening.desc: Award-winning vegetarian restaurant in heart of Soho.

days.tip: Visit Borough Market early to avoid crowds and get the best selection - many vendors offer free samples.

days.intro: Experience London's royal heritage with palace visits and elegant gardens.

morning.name: Buckingham Palace
morning.desc: Tour the State Rooms of the working royal palace.

morning.name: St. James's Park
morning.desc: Romantic stroll through royal park with lake views.

afternoon.name: Westminster Abbey
afternoon.desc: Historic church where royal weddings and coronations occur.

afternoon.name: Houses of Parliament
afternoon.desc: Guided tour of the iconic seat of British democracy.

evening.name: Hyde Park
evening.desc: Sunset walk through London's most famous royal park.

evening.name: Sketch Restaurant
evening.desc: Unique fine dining experience in artistic pink room.

days.tip: Book palace tours well in advance as they often sell out, especially during summer months.

days.intro: End your London adventure with shopping, markets, and memorable final meals.

morning.name: British Museum
morning.desc: Explore world treasures in this magnificent museum.

morning.name: Bloomsbury Walk
morning.desc: Stroll through literary district with beautiful garden squares.

afternoon.name: Camden Market
afternoon.desc: Browse alternative market for unique souvenirs and street food.

afternoon.name: Regent's Park
afternoon.desc: Peaceful park perfect for final romantic moments together.

evening.name: Farewell Dinner
evening.desc: Celebrate your trip at Saravanaa Bhavan for authentic South Indian.

evening.name: Thames Night Walk
evening.desc: Romantic evening stroll along the illuminated riverbank.

days.tip: Leave time for departure preparations and consider purchasing an Oyster Card souvenir as a keepsake.

food.intro: London's food scene embraces vegetarian cuisine with incredible diversity from traditional British to authentic Indian flavors.
food.tip: Most pubs serve excellent vegetarian food, and tipping 10-12% is standard at restaurants but not required at pubs.

neighborhoods.name: Covent Garden
neighborhoods.desc: Central location with theaters, restaurants, and easy transport

neighborhoods.name: South Bank
neighborhoods.desc: Riverside location near Borough Market and cultural sites
neighborhoods.whyStay: Close to Tate Modern and markets

neighborhoods.name: Soho
neighborhoods.desc: Vibrant LGBTQ+ friendly area with nightlife and dining
neighborhoods.whyStay: Heart of gay scene with great restaurants

midRange.name: Hub by Premier Inn Covent Garden

hotels.tip: Book early for better rates and consider hotels near tube stations for easy transport to attractions.

getYourGuide.name: London Eye Fast Track
getYourGuide.desc: Skip the lines for iconic wheel views over the Thames.

getYourGuide.name: Harry Potter Studio Tour
getYourGuide.desc: Behind-the-scenes movie magic with transport from central London.

getYourGuide.name: Windsor Castle Day Trip
getYourGuide.desc: Royal castle visit with convenient coach transport included.

hiddenGems.name: Little Venice Canal Walk
hiddenGems.desc: Romantic waterway stroll away from tourist crowds.

hiddenGems.name: God's Own Junkyard
hiddenGems.desc: Neon art gallery and cafe in East London.

packing.title: April London Packing Guide
packing.intro: Pack layers for mild spring weather with occasional rain showers and comfortable walking shoes for cobblestone streets.
packing.luggage: A carry-on and personal item should be sufficient for a 4-day trip with strategic packing.
packing.tip: Pack a day pack for sightseeing and always carry a light rain jacket - London weather is unpredictable.

bookTrip.intro: Round-trip flights from Philadelphia to London typically cost $600-800 per person in April.
